description: Machine-readable reaction-coverage benchmark for the MENDEL rule pipeline (parser -> identifier -> descriptor -> predictor -> negotiator). Every reaction_smiles is RDKit-parseable. Pass/fail is decided only by the machine-readable fields below; there is no natural-language expected_note. Fields: expected_mechanism_hint (str|null exact match), allowed_mechanism_hints (list|null membership), required_group_types (list|null subset of detected), required_reaction_center_group_types (list|null subset of reaction-center group types), max_reaction_center_groups (int|null upper bound), expected_failure_mode (str|null; when set, the case is recorded but never counts as a CI failure).

reactions.name: da_butadiene_ethylene
reactions.notes: Canonical Diels-Alder; MENDEL strong suit.

reactions.name: da_cyclopentadiene_ethylene
reactions.notes: Cyclopentadiene diene + ethylene dienophile.

reactions.name: da_butadiene_acrolein
reactions.notes: Electron-poor dienophile (acrolein); carbonyl is an activator, alkene is the center.

reactions.name: da_butadiene_maleic_anhydride
reactions.notes: Maleic anhydride classic dienophile.

reactions.name: hetero_da_butadiene_formaldehyde
reactions.notes: Hetero-Diels-Alder. KNOWN LIMITATION: the carbonyl heterodienophile is detected but is not yet marked a reaction center; only the diene alkene center is required here.

reactions.name: hetero_da_butadiene_acetaldehyde
reactions.notes: Hetero-Diels-Alder with acetaldehyde; same heterodienophile-center limitation as formaldehyde case.

reactions.name: michael_nitromethane_mvk
reactions.notes: Michael addition of nitromethane to MVK. The enone alkene beta-carbon is the electrophilic center; the carbonyl is demoted to an activating spectator.

reactions.name: michael_dimethylmalonate_mvk
reactions.notes: Malonate (stabilised carbanion) conjugate addition to MVK.

reactions.name: michael_methylamine_mvk
reactions.notes: Aza-Michael addition of an amine to MVK.

reactions.name: michael_malononitrile_acrylonitrile
reactions.notes: Nitrile-activated acceptor (acrylonitrile) + malononitrile donor.

reactions.name: michael_thiol_mvk
reactions.notes: Thia-Michael. The thiol nucleophile is NOT a supported functional group in v0.1, so the donor is unrepresented; the enone acceptor center is still correctly identified.

reactions.name: michael_cyclohexenone_malonate
reactions.notes: Cyclohexenone (endocyclic enone) + malonate.

reactions.name: michael_acrylamide_amine
reactions.notes: Amide-activated acceptor (acrylamide); aza-Michael.

reactions.name: isocyanide_alkylation_methyl_iodide
reactions.notes: Isocyanide alkylation. Primary goal: confirm the isocyanide is detected; the halide drives an SN2-like hint.

reactions.name: isocyanide_acyl_chloride_nef_model
reactions.notes: Nef-type isocyanide + acyl chloride. Detection of the isocyanide is the goal; the acyl-chloride chlorine is on an sp2 carbon so it is not detected as a halide, and the mechanism hint is not modelled. Recorded, not a CI failure.

reactions.name: ugi_imine_isocyanide_addition
reactions.notes: Ugi-like imine + isocyanide addition. Both the imine electrophile and isocyanide nucleophile are detected and marked centers.

reactions.name: passerini_aldehyde_isocyanide_carboxylate
reactions.notes: Passerini-like three-component reaction. All three components are detected; the multicomponent mechanism is not modelled. Recorded, not a CI failure.

reactions.name: click_methylazide_propyne
reactions.notes: Azide-alkyne Huisgen cycloaddition. Must be click_like, NOT diels_alder_like.

reactions.name: click_benzylazide_phenylacetylene
reactions.notes: Benzyl azide + phenylacetylene CuAAC model.

reactions.name: radical_methyl_ethylene
reactions.notes: Radical addition of a methyl radical to ethylene. Must NOT collapse to radical_bromination_like.

reactions.name: radical_benzylic_bromination
reactions.notes: Wohl-Ziegler benzylic bromination of toluene.

reactions.name: minisci_pyridine_methyl
reactions.notes: Minisci-type radical addition to a pyridine (heteroaromatic nitrogen) ring.

reactions.name: giese_methyl_acrylate
reactions.notes: Giese radical conjugate addition to methyl acrylate. Must be giese_like, not generic radical_addition_like.

reactions.name: sn2_methyl_bromide_hydroxide
reactions.notes: Standard SN2.

reactions.name: e2_2bromopropane_ethoxide
reactions.notes: E2 elimination; shares the sn2_or_e2_like hint in v0.1.

reactions.name: aldol_acetone_acetaldehyde
reactions.notes: Standard aldol; regression guard that Michael detection did not steal plain aldols.

reactions.name: cross_aldol_benzaldehyde_acetone
reactions.notes: Crossed aldol of benzaldehyde + acetone.

reactions.name: ester_hydrolysis_methyl_acetate
reactions.notes: Ester hydrolysis; water is detected as an alcohol-like nucleophile.

reactions.name: control_ethyl_acetate_no_reaction
reactions.notes: Negative control: a benign ester that does not react must NOT invent a reactive center.

reactions.name: control_benzene_no_reaction
reactions.notes: Negative control: inert arene, no reaction center.
